title: Студия 18.5 м²
subtitle: Скандинавский минимализм
description: Самый компактный формат из доступных в Первом Нагатинском. Светлая палитра, скрытые системы хранения, кровать-трансформер у окна. Зона приготовления и обеденная стойка единым блоком вдоль одной стены.

images.title: От входа
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior photography of a small Scandinavian studio apartment, 18.5 sqm. View from the entry door looking deep into the apartment toward a south-facing window. LAYOUT: bathroom door visible on the immediate LEFT just past the entry; then a single-line kitchen along the LEFT wall with white matte cabinets, single basin sink, integrated induction cooktop, white subway tile backsplash; against the RIGHT wall sits a low platform bed with crisp white linen bedding; a small round wooden coffee table in the center; a single bouclé armchair near the window; large vertical window at the FAR end with sheer linen curtains. Pale ash hardwood floor, matte white walls. Cool natural daylight from window. Architectural digest style, eye-level camera, sharp focus. NO yellow tint, NO warm beige, NO bed near sink.

images.title: Кухня вдоль стены
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior photo of the kitchen zone in the same Scandinavian studio 18.5 sqm. View looking AT the LEFT wall where the kitchen is located. Single-line kitchen: tall white matte cabinets, single basin stainless sink, integrated induction cooktop, white subway tile backsplash, pale grey laminate countertop, brushed-steel pull handles, an open shelf above with two ceramic mugs. In the foreground edge, the corner of a wooden round table is visible. Pale ash hardwood floor. Cool daylight from a window to the right. Magazine-quality interior photography, eye-level camera, sharp focus. NO bed visible in this shot. White and cool grey palette.

images.title: От окна
images.prompt: Photorealistic wide-angle interior photo of the same Scandinavian studio 18.5 sqm, this time viewed from NEAR the south window looking BACK toward the entry door. LAYOUT: small round wooden coffee table and bouclé armchair in the immediate foreground; against the RIGHT wall (left of camera) stands a low platform bed with crisp white linen bedding; the kitchen on the FAR wall (right of camera as we look back) with white matte cabinets; bathroom door visible at the far end near the entry. Pale ash hardwood floor, matte white walls. Soft natural daylight from behind camera. Architectural digest style photography, eye-level, sharp focus.

title: Студия 20 м²
subtitle: Japandi
description: Сочетание японского минимализма и скандинавского тепла. Низкая мебель, натуральный орех, бумажные светильники. Зона сна за раздвижной перегородкой в духе сёдзи.

images.title: От входа
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a Japandi style studio apartment, 20 sqm. View from the entry looking south. LAYOUT: bathroom door on immediate LEFT; kitchen line along the LEFT wall with low walnut wood cabinets, beige stone countertop, single basin sink, integrated cooktop, no upper cabinets; against the RIGHT wall sits a low platform futon-style bed with linen bedding, separated from the rest by a partially-open sliding wooden lattice partition (shoji-inspired); in front of the partition: low coffee table with ceramic bonsai; large window at the FAR end with rice-paper-like sheer curtains. Warm beige plaster walls, natural oak wood floor, paper-lantern pendant lamp above. Calm, serene atmosphere, soft diffused daylight. NO bright yellow tint, NO orange palette.

images.title: Кухня
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of the kitchen zone in the same Japandi studio 20 sqm. View looking at the LEFT wall where kitchen is located. Low walnut wood lower cabinets only (no upper cabinets), beige stone countertop with subtle veining, single basin black matte sink, brass tap, single small induction cooktop, narrow open shelf above with ceramic bowls. Wooden tall stool with cushion in foreground. Warm beige walls, natural oak wood floor. Indoor plant in ceramic pot. Soft natural daylight from the right. NO bed in shot, NO sleeping area visible. Architectural digest, sharp focus.

images.title: Сёдзи
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior detail of a half-open sliding wooden lattice partition (shoji-style) in the same Japandi studio 20 sqm. Through the half-open partition we see a low platform futon bed with linen bedding behind it. Frame and slats are natural walnut wood, the panels are paper-like translucent material that softens the light. Warm beige plaster walls, natural oak wood floor. In the foreground: a single bonsai plant in a ceramic pot on a wooden stool. Indirect natural light filtering through the partition. Magazine quality photography, sharp focus.

title: Студия 29.9 м²
subtitle: Soft Loft
description: Мягкий лофт без бетонной грубости. Кирпичный акцент, тёплая палитра дерева, чёрный металл, латунь. Спальное место отделено стеллажом-перегородкой, кухня с барной стойкой.

images.title: Гостиная
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a Soft Loft style studio apartment, 29.9 sqm, living area. LAYOUT: ONE exposed red brick accent wall on the LEFT; cool dark-grey plastered walls elsewhere; wide-plank dark oak hardwood floor. Grey-blue linen sofa with throw blanket positioned in the center facing a wooden coffee table; tall black metal industrial floor lamp beside the sofa; small leather armchair on the right; large black-framed window at the back wall with view of city. Behind the sofa stands an open black-metal shelving room divider with books and decor (separating sleeping zone). One pendant industrial-style brass lamp hanging above the coffee table. Cool grey + warm wood + brick palette, NOT beige. Evening warm lamp light mixed with cool daylight from window. Architectural photography, eye-level, sharp focus. NO bed visible in this shot.

images.title: Кухня + бар
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of the kitchen-bar zone in the same Soft Loft studio 29.9 sqm. View toward the kitchen wall. LAYOUT: dark-grey matte cabinets along one wall, black metal handles, white marble countertop with grey veining, brass tap, single basin sink, black induction cooktop; an extended bar counter projects out of the cabinetry into the room with two black metal bar stools with wooden seats. Pendant industrial brass lamps hanging above the bar. Same exposed red brick accent wall visible to the side. Wide-plank dark oak floor. Dark grey + marble + brass palette. NO bed in shot, NO sleeping area. Architectural digest sharp focus.

images.title: Спальная зона
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of the bedroom zone in the same Soft Loft studio 29.9 sqm. Sleeping zone separated from living room by an open black-metal shelving room divider (the same one visible in living view) with books and decor; through the shelves we see the living room sofa silhouette. LAYOUT: a queen bed against the back wall with dark grey linen bedding, two leather-look accent pillows, brass wall-mounted reading lamp above one side. Wide-plank dark oak floor. Partial exposed red brick on far wall. Cool grey + dark wood + brick palette. Eye-level photography, magazine quality, sharp focus. NO kitchen visible in this shot, NO sink.

title: Студия 30.4 м²
subtitle: Современная классика
description: Сдержанная классика, нейтральная палитра крем + бежевый. Паркет ёлочкой, латунные детали, мягкое кресло у окна. Кухня замаскирована под мебельную композицию.

images.title: Гостиная-спальня
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a modern classic style studio apartment, 30.4 sqm, living-sleeping area. LAYOUT: queen bed against the LEFT wall with cream linen bedding and a silk throw, two upholstered cream nightstands with brass table lamps. Classical wall mouldings, brass picture rail. Herringbone parquet wood floor in light oak. Sheer linen curtains at a large window on the BACK wall. A separate seating area on the right with a single upholstered cream armchair and small side table. Ivory and cream palette with restrained brass accents. NO yellow tones in the overall image. Soft natural daylight from window, magazine-quality interior photography, eye-level, sharp focus.

images.title: Кухня-столовая
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of the kitchen-dining area in the same modern classic studio 30.4 sqm. View toward the kitchen wall. LAYOUT: cream cabinetry with raised classical panels and brass cup handles, white marble countertop with subtle veining, brass tap, integrated appliances disguised behind matching panels. Marble-top round dining table in center with two upholstered cream chairs. Brass pendant lamp hanging above the table. Herringbone parquet wood floor. Cream walls. Soft daylight. Refined, sophisticated. NO bed visible in this shot, NO sleeping area. Architectural digest quality, sharp focus.

images.title: Эркер
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior close-up of the bay-window seating area in the same modern classic studio 30.4 sqm. LAYOUT: a single upholstered cream armchair with cushion in the bay window nook, small round marble side table next to it with a stack of books and a brass table lamp, sheer linen curtains framing the bay. Herringbone parquet floor in light oak. Soft natural daylight streaming in. Ivory-cream palette, brass accents. Refined, restful. Magazine-quality interior photography, eye-level shot, sharp focus.
